creator: freebsd.68fba@nospam.spacesurfer.com
text:
I am afraid I no longer have that card. On my current system this problem does not happen, but its a totally different setup.
I am using the graphics card that comes with an intel i7-4790K, running the i915kms.ko kernel module with the drivers from xf86-video-intel-2.99.917.20181203 on a 11.2-RELEASE-p8 kernel.
